Subject: NCM-P-2025-08-22 Huntington Bank Adds Arizona to Agency Products
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-08-22 11:27:11-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Huntington Bank has expanded their offerings to permit Arizona properties for Agency products. This enhancement enables us to work towards Huntington’s requirement of delivering to them a specific mix of products. If NOVA meets this requirement, our Production team will have renewed access to their Doctor loan program.  Please see below for additional detail. 

Channel: Banked

Product Type: FHA, Conventional

Guidelines <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EtChT0G1ivxBiWyuPyTuKkgBMKNkh8-StXB4wpIzAhX92Q?e=d6X9Di> 

Underwriting: Non-delegated only

IMPORTANT NOTES

*	Available products include FHA and Conventional
*	Non-delegated only
*	Available in AZ, CO, IN, PA, KY, IL, NC, WA, FL (excluding Dade and Broward counties). 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

For inquiries, contact: 

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Dept <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com>
